theme: Milan — Where business meets la dolce vita

linkedin.text:
You just closed a record quarter.

Your top performers deserve more than a gift card.

Imagine 25 of your best people in Milan for 3 days:

→ Private tour of the Duomo terrace at sunset
→ Corporate cooking class with a Michelin-starred chef
→ Aperitivo networking at a rooftop bar overlooking the city
→ Shopping experience on Via Montenapoleone (yes, branded)
→ Gala dinner in a 16th-century palazzo

Milan is where Italian efficiency meets luxury. It's the city that says "we're serious about excellence."

And unlike Rome, your team can walk everywhere. It's compact, vibrant, and effortlessly sophisticated.

2h 40min direct flight from Tel Aviv. No jet lag. Pure experience.

📩 alon@upe.co.il

Alon Ouaknine

#Milan #Italy #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #TeamBuilding #LuxuryTravel #UproductionEvents #MICE
